rule CDB_Exploit_for_CVE202612432_exploit {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Exploit for CVE-2026-12432 exploit"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-28"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-12432" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
